name: cybrix-deploy
description: Deploy the current static site to a live HTTPS URL via Cybrix. Detects Next.js export, Astro, Vite, Hugo, Eleventy, and plain HTML. Returns a live URL on *.cbrx.cc in under 60 seconds.

token.title: Cybrix API Token
token.description: Your Cybrix API token from app.cybrix.cc/dashboard. Stored securely in your system keychain.
